prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `45bbe264`.
codex_response:
Implemented ARC2 task `45bbe264` as a new package under [task_45bbe264](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_45bbe264). The rule is: each non-background seed pixel expands into a full row and full column of its own color, and every cross-source row/column intersection becomes red (`2`) except the original seed cells. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed and no new `dsl_ext` primitive was added.

The task wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_45bbe264/__init__.py), the DSL-style solver is in [verifier.py:4](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_45bbe264/verifier.py#L4), and the generator is in [generator.py:57](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_45bbe264/generator.py#L57). The generator samples square grids with 2-3 distinct seed pixels, distinct rows and columns, and the observed official palette subset to stay on-family.

Verification passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are present at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/45bbe264/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/45bbe264/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/45bbe264/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/45bbe264/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/45bbe264/previews/preview_03.png).
